LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED; PLAINTIFF KATHERINE CHAMBERLIN'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS SETTLEMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING TO PROVIDE NOTICE TO THE ABSENT CLASS. THE SETTLEMENT PROVIDES VERY LITTLE, IF ANY, REAL VALUE TO THE CLASS BECAUSE MEMBERS OF THE CLASS ARE UNLIKELY TO KNOW OF THEIR RIGHT TO REDEEM THE GIFT CARDS FOR CASH. THIS CONCERN MIGHT BE RECTIFIED BY POSTING NOTICES NEAR CASH REGISTER STATIONS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Final Approval Hearing Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT HANCOCK OF PACIFIC JUSTICE CENTER, TEL. NO. 310-1940 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DIANE L. WEBB OF THE MORGAN LEWIS LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 442-1353 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE PAPERS ARE IN PROPER ORDER AND THE SETTLEMENT TO BE FAIR REASONABLE AND ADEQUATE INCLUDING THE ATTORNEY'S FEE AND INCENTIVE AWARD. Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT B. HANCOCK OF PACIFIC JUSTICE, TEL. NO. 310-1940 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DIANE L. WEBB OF MORGAN LEWIS, TEL. NO. 442-1353 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS EVERTHING IN GOOD CAUSE TO APPROVE THE CLASS SETTLEMENT. Final approval hearing is set for February 21, 2013. (Moving party to prepare a form of order pursuant to the instruction of the court at the hearing) Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-29-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Continued To Oct-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prelim Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT B. HANCOCK OF PACIFIC JUSTICE, TEL. NO. 310-1940 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DIANE L. WEBB OF MORGAN LEWIS, TEL. NO. 442-1353 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WALGREENS.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF KATHERINE CHAMBERLIN'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement is Denied without prejudice of refiling to provide notice to the absent class. The settlement provides very little, if any, real value to the class because members of the class are unlikely to know of their right to redeem the gift cards for cash. This concern might be rectified by posting notices near cash register stations. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
